---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: devndesigner6
---

## Problem / Motivation
Describe the problem this feature would solve or the motivation behind the request.
Example: "As a user managing 10 subscriptions, it is frustrating when..."

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches or features you considered.

## Scope
Which part of the project would this affect?
- [ ] Smart contracts (TEAL / AVM)
- [ ] Autonomous agent
- [ ] Frontend UI
- [ ] Supabase / Database
- [ ] ARC compliance
- [ ] Other

## Additional Context
Any mockups, references, or extra information.
